creator: info@martenvijn.nl
text:
with exact the same hardware:


PC Engines WRAP.1C/1D/1E v1.11
640 KB Base Memory
64512 KB Extended Memory

01F0 Master 044A CF CARD 2GB                             
Phys C/H/S 3909/16/63 Log C/H/S 977/64/63
ROM segment 0xe000 length 0x8000 reloc 0x00020000
Etherboot 5.3.12 (GPL) http://etherboot.org
Drivers: NATSEMI   Images: NBI PXE   Exports: PXE   
Relocating _text from: [00089370,0009b230) to [03eee140,03f00000)
Boot from (N)etwork (D)isk or (Q)uit?
